---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Provide a brief and clear description of the requested feature.

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem, limitation, or user need that motivates this feature request.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how the feature should work and how it would address the problem.

## Expected Outcome
Describe the expected behavior once the feature is implemented.

## Benefits
- Improves user experience
- Enhances functionality
- Addresses an existing limitation

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative approaches or solutions that were considered.

## Additional Context
Include any relevant screenshots, mockups, references, or other supporting information.
